top_signals.title: Commission approves €402 million Spanish State aid for road transport companies facing increased fuel prices
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 29 Jun 2026 The European Commission has approved a €402 million Spanish State aid scheme to support road transport companies facing increased fuel prices due to the Middle East crisis.

top_signals.title: The Retail Payments Infrastructure Board launches consultation on the next generation UK payments infrastructure
top_signals.summary: Today marks a major milestone in the modernisation of the UK's payments landscape, with the Retail Payments Infrastructure Board (RPIB) launching a consultation on the future design of the UK's next-generation retail payments infrastructure.

top_signals.title: Indonesia Capital Flight Caps Most-Profitable Bank’s Wealth Push
top_signals.summary: Indonesia’s biggest non-state bank said capital flight has hampered efforts to expand its wealth management business, underscoring how an erosion of investor confidence is hindering the private sector in Southeast Asia’s largest economy.
